Workflow.name: SecondIdCreating22
Workflow.Description: This Task is creating an admin account in an application based on the action selected by the user.

Step.name: Initialize
Step.Description: Intializing the formModel object in this step.

Step.name: DataCollection

Form.name: AccountSectionForm
Form.Description: Selecting which type of account is required for the user.

Step.Description: Taking the data from the requester throough a form.

Step.name: PlanBuilding
Step.Description: Building a provisioning plan based on the inputs given by the Requester.
